description: Build DatoCMS plugins using datocms-plugin-sdk. Use when users want to create or modify a DatoCMS plugin, work with the connect() function, field extensions, sidebar panels, custom pages, dropdown actions, asset sources, lifecycle hooks, modals, config screens, inspectors, outlets, upload sidebars, record presentation, structured text customization, or any plugin SDK hooks.

results.query: I want to build a custom DatoCMS plugin that adds a sidebar panel showing word count, reading time, and SEO score for the current record. It should use renderItemFormSidebar from the plugin SDK.
how do i create a field extension plugin for datocms that replaces the default string editor with a color picker? i want it to show a color wheel and save the hex value. using datocms-plugin-sdk

I need to build a DatoCMS plugin with a custom page that shows an analytics dashboard. It should appear in the main navigation and fetch data from our API. Using renderPage hook and the connect() function.
Can you help me create a DatoCMS plugin that adds a dropdown action on records? When editors click it, it should duplicate the record and all its linked blocks. Using itemFormDropdownActions hook.
I want to make a custom asset source plugin for DatoCMS that lets editors search and import images from Unsplash directly into the media library. Using the assetSources hook.

need to build a datocms plugin that opens a modal dialog when you click a button in a sidebar panel. the modal should show a form, and when submitted, update a field on the current record. using openModal and the ctx object

I'm building a DatoCMS plugin that needs a settings page where admins can configure an API key and select which models the plugin applies to. How do I use renderConfigScreen and manualFieldExtensions?
How do I scaffold a new DatoCMS plugin project from scratch? I need the right project structure, package.json, and the connect() entry point configured correctly.
I want to customize how structured text fields work in DatoCMS. I need to add custom marks (like 'highlight' and 'footnote') and custom block types to the structured text editor via a plugin.
I need to query all products from DatoCMS using GraphQL and render them with responsive images. Can you write the CDA query and the React component?
How do I create records in DatoCMS programmatically? I need to bulk import 200 articles using the Content Management API client.
Help me set up draft mode for my Next.js site with DatoCMS. I need the enable/disable endpoints and the executeQuery wrapper with dual tokens.
I need to write a migration script using the DatoCMS CLI to add new fields to my blog_post model. How do I use datocms migrations:new?
How do I render DatoCMS structured text in my React app using the StructuredText component from react-datocms? I have custom blocks that need special rendering.
Can you help me set up cache tag invalidation for my Nuxt site with DatoCMS? When content changes I want to purge only the affected pages from Cloudflare.
I want to build a Chrome extension that adds a toolbar to any website. It should have a popup with React components and communicate with a background service worker.
I need to set up real-time content subscriptions on my SvelteKit preview site so editors see live updates. Using DatoCMS SSE and the @datocms/svelte package.
How do I build a VS Code extension that provides custom snippets and IntelliSense for a DSL? I need to register a language server and define token types.
